org_constraint: The first paragraph must start with the phrase "During my recent stay."
new_constraint: The first paragraph must start with "Last month, I visited."

During my recent stay, I wanted to highlight several key aspects regarding the guest experience and service quality at the property, which unfortunately did not meet my expectations for a premium booking. While the front desk staff were notably welcoming and assisted promptly with arrival logistics, the overall maintenance standards showed significant inconsistencies throughout the building. For instance, our room felt distinctly dated compared to the modern lobby, featuring curtains stained near the edges and a bathroom fixture that rattled whenever water ran at a neighbor’s unit nearby.

The location undeniably offered excellent convenience, situated just five minutes from the city center with easy access to public transit and local dining options. However, the noise levels were disruptive; traffic sounds seeped through the thin walls, and late-night hallway footsteps seemed amplified after hours, likely due to poor insulation. Furthermore, the complimentary breakfast selection lacked variety, offering mostly dry toast and stale pastries rather than fresh fruit or hot items that justify the resort fee included in the package.

Ultimately, while there were bright spots regarding the check-in efficiency, the cumulative effect of the wear-and-tear issues and environmental disturbances suggested a decline in upkeep standards. Guests seeking quiet rest should verify their view orientation upon booking, as corner rooms may suffer more from wind and noise depending on the season. I would recommend staying elsewhere if budget permits, specifically prioriting newer openings on the same street where these operational flaws appear less prevalent.<|im_end|>

final_answer:
During my recent stay, I wanted to highlight several key aspects regarding the guest experience and service quality at the property, which unfortunately did not meet my expectations for a premium booking. While the front desk staff were notably welcoming and assisted promptly with arrival logistics, the overall maintenance standards showed significant inconsistencies throughout the building. For instance, our room felt distinctly dated compared to the modern lobby, featuring curtains stained near the edges and a bathroom fixture that rattled whenever water ran at a neighbor’s unit nearby.

The location undeniably offered excellent convenience, situated just five minutes from the city center with easy access to public transit and local dining options. However, the noise levels were disruptive; traffic sounds seeped through the thin walls, and late-night hallway footsteps seemed amplified after hours, likely due to poor insulation. Furthermore, the complimentary breakfast selection lacked variety, offering mostly dry toast and stale pastries rather than fresh fruit or hot items that justify the resort fee included in the package.

Ultimately, while there were bright spots regarding the check-in efficiency, the cumulative effect of the wear-and-tear issues and environmental disturbances suggested a decline in upkeep standards. Guests seeking quiet rest should verify their view orientation upon booking, as corner rooms may suffer more from wind and noise depending on the season. I would recommend staying elsewhere if budget permits, specifically prioriting newer openings on the same street where these operational flaws appear less prevalent.<|im_end|>
